method: No-price four-quad regime map. Growth and inflation axes are scored from current public-source scanner evidence and resolve to positive or negative.
subtitle: Growth positive / Inflation positive
simpleRead: Growth evidence is supportive while inflation pressure is elevated.

states.name: Goldilocks
states.subtitle: Growth positive / Inflation negative
states.simpleRead: Growth evidence is supportive while inflation pressure is easing.

states.name: Reflation
states.subtitle: Growth positive / Inflation positive
states.simpleRead: Growth evidence is supportive while inflation pressure is elevated.

states.name: Stagflation
states.subtitle: Growth negative / Inflation positive
states.simpleRead: Growth evidence is weakening while inflation pressure remains elevated.

states.name: Deflation
states.subtitle: Growth negative / Inflation negative
states.simpleRead: Growth evidence is weakening while inflation pressure is easing.

limits: Uses current public-source pressure only; no price data is used.
